Patch Set 10:

Sylvain, any idea why it's failing here ?
It seems that it fails very fast in the deployment process

Patch Set 10:

> Patch Set 10:
> 
> Sylvain, any idea why it's failing here ?
> It seems that it fails very fast in the deployment process

Hey,
some explanations here:

* we have arrived to "ONAP testing" part which means docker container creation went well
* we a "lot" of errors but looking at html files but it's a consequence of three stuffs not related to this patch
  - netbox app didn't deploy correctly. It happens sometime, I want to fix but never had time to do it
  - dcae deployment went bad so some "deployed by dcae" containers are not present and then DCAE complains and some e2e tests cannot be performed (they use DCAE)
  - SDC went wild on the basic e2e (SDC has some race conditions when several Services are created in parallel, a ticket is opened)
* clamp project was not on the "whitelist" for html pages so we can't see them easily :/

I've fixed (at least I think I have) the last one so let's oom_redeploy
